pr.title: Add lead tasks table
pr.body: ## Summary - Adds `lead_tasks` with `lead_id`, `title`, `due_date`, and `completed` fields. - Adds indexes for lead/task lookup and completion status. - Adds RLS policies scoped through the parent dealer lead owner. - Includes the `lead_tasks` schema in `RUN_IN_SUPABASE.sql`. - Adds `test_drive_bookings` with `vehicle_id`, `dealer_id`, `customer_name`, `booking_time`, and `status` fields. - Adds indexes and RLS policies for dealer-owned test drive bookings. - Includes `test_drive_bookings` in `RUN_IN_SUPABASE.sql`. - Adds sample CRM tasks to the John Smith/Toyota Hilux lead: `Call customer tomorrow`, `Send finance quote`, and `Arrange inspection`. - Updates the CRM lead detail Tasks section to render lead-specific tasks when available. - Adds a sample CRM schedule: Monday 10:00 Test Drive, Monday 12:00 Inspection, Tuesday 9:30 Vehicle Pickup. - Shows scheduled CRM items grouped by day on the CRM lead detail page. - Adds `/dealers/calendar` with a weekly dealer calendar view for scheduled CRM/test-drive items. - Links `/dealers/calendar` from the dealer dashboard. - Adds an iCal/Apple/Outlook-compatible `.ics` endpoint at `/api/dealers/calendar/ics`. - Adds per-event Google Calendar links from the dealer calendar page. - Adds `/api/dealers/calendar/reminders` to send a push reminder for the next scheduled calendar item using the existing push system. - Adds a dealer calendar push reminder button. ## Testing - `git diff --check` - `npx eslint src/lib/dealer-crm-sample-leads.ts 'src/app/dealers/crm/[leadId]/page.tsx'` - `npx eslint src/app/dealers/calendar/page.tsx src/app/dealers/dashboard/page.tsx` - `npx eslint src/lib/dealer-calendar-events.ts src/app/api/dealers/calendar/ics/route.ts src/app/api/dealers/calendar/reminders/route.ts src/components/DealerCalendarReminderButton.tsx src/app/dealers/calendar/page.tsx` - `npm run build`
pr.author: shaunsjjones1977-create
